effect.subject: gradients
effect.reserved_for: approved gradient set only (Brand Blue → Dark Navy; Sky Blue → Deep Blue; Sunshine → 75% Gold; Golden Sand → White → Light Blue; Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine; Masthead Sunshine → light gold)

rule_text: Never invent gradients. Only the approved gradient set may be used: Brand Blue → Dark Navy (#00529b → #011E45), Sky Blue → Deep Blue (#358CCB → #003D74), Sunshine → 75% Gold (#faa31b → Gold @75%), Golden Sand → White → Light Blue (#FEF1C8 → #ffffff → #E6F0F9), Golden Sand → 75% Gold → Sunshine (#FEF1C8 → Gold @75% → #faa31b), and the Masthead gradient Sunshine → light gold (#faa31b → ≈#ffe05c). Approved values only.
intent: Preserve brand color integrity by preventing ad-hoc gradients.
summary: Use only approved gradients: Brand Blue→Dark Navy (#00529b→#011E45), Sky Blue→Deep Blue (#358CCB→#003D74), Sunshine→75% Gold (#faa31b→Gold @75%), Golden Sand→White→Light Blue (#FEF1C8→#ffffff→#E6F0F9), Golden Sand→75% Gold→Sunshine (#FEF1C8→Gold @75%→#faa31b), Masthead Sunshine→Light Gold (#faa31b→≈#ffe05c).
